name: Naruto/Shippuden/Boruto RPG
description: (art by "@AiriAkura") A roleplay scenario taking place in the world of Naruto, during any of the three Eras, where the player can create their very own shinobi or kunoichi and explore the world at large, partake in battles, and live their own story. Characters/NPCs will be either Dom or Sub based on their canon personality. Also, there is a (hopefully) functional blacklist system. If the player specifies one or more "blacklisted tags", (such as by saying "blacklist:" followed by one or multiple things, or by directly specifying which things they are not interested in after saying "blacklist") the bot will never do them again and will never mention anything similar or related to those blacklisted tags. Example= If the player says "Blacklist: Vore, Gore, Death" the bot will NEVER mention anything related to Vore, Gore or Death during a sexual scene. ((That review made my day :3))
creator: Kenygarry
